description_long: This object is a round, slightly flattened pastry with a pale golden-brown exterior and a dusting of flour on its surface. The top is gently domed with subtle creases and folds, giving it a rustic, handmade appearance. The sides reveal a thin, darker seam where the pastry has been split, exposing a hint of a soft, layered interior. One side shows a deeper brown, almost caramelized area, suggesting a well-baked edge. The overall texture appears soft and slightly uneven, with a matte finish and no visible toppings. Its compact size and familiar shape make it suitable for placement in urban environments such as bakeries, cafes, or street food stalls.
description: A round, pale golden-brown pastry with a flour-dusted, matte surface and subtle creases, showing a soft, layered interior at the edges.
description_view_0: The pastry is seen from a slightly angled top view, highlighting the domed surface, flour dusting, and a dark seam along the side.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the smooth, rounded top and the even, pale coloration with minimal visible seams.
description_view_2: The side view reveals a deeper brown, caramelized edge and a more pronounced seam, suggesting a split in the pastry.
description_view_3: A lower angle shows the underside and a prominent, darker baked section, with the seam and some internal layers visible.
